title: HOMESHOPA Food Storage Containers, 3 Pack Rectangular BPA Free Plastic Containers with Airtight Lids, Reusable, Stackable, Nestable Meal Prep Boxes, Microwavable, Freezer and Dishwasher Safe, 270 ML
features: HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL: Our food storage containers are made of high-quality BPA-free plastic to ensure safe food storage performance. These multipurpose food storage containers are non-toxic, long-lasting, and stretchy enough to withstand everyday use. These containers are safe for the freezer, dishwasher, and microwave. This 50-piece set of plastic containers is a must-have for any kind of organisation.

AIRTIGHT SEAL: The tight-sealing lids completely seal these plastic containers, keeping the contents fresh for longer. This means you can transport your containers without fear of your food spoiling. Any of the portable containers will comfortably fit in your bag, making them ideal for work lunches, lunch boxes, catering, and travel. They're also great for meal prep, portion control, storing leftovers, and picnics. You can even use them to make baby or pet food.

SEE THROUGH CONTAINER: These airtight storage containers are made of clear plastic, allowing you to easily identify the appropriate and desired storage content in small food containers with lids. You can easily determine the type of food item contained within by placing them in kitchen racks or shelves, refrigerators, or pantries.

DESIGNED TO SAVE SPACE: These reusable meal prep containers with lids have been specifically designed to save space; they are stackable and nesting and will easily fit into your refrigerator, freezer, or cupboard, allowing you to organise your kitchen and free up pantry space.

MAKE LIFE EASIER: Our microwavable containers can be stacked for easy storage; they are reusable, making them ideal for healthy meal preparation; they can be used not only for food storage, but also as lunch boxes. Our lids are very well-made, will not spill food, and are very easy to transport.

MULTIPURPOSE ORGANIZER: Looking for something else to store in our deli containers? Great concept! They're also excellent for storing non-food items such as office supplies, hardware, and other items! Our rectangular containers are the ideal size for keeping food and other household items in pristine condition. With these 9.5 oz clear containers, you can easily sort through your items.
